channel.title: Breaking Into InfoSec on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Breaking Into InfoSec on Vandana Verma

item.title: Breaking into InfoSec with Vandana Verma
item.description: An overview of the Breaking Into InfoSec series and the broader goal of helping newcomers find practical entry points into security.

item.title: Security Career Advice with Guy Podjarny
item.description: Career advice for people breaking into security, with perspective from Snyk founder Guy Podjarny.

item.title: How to be an InfoSec Speaker
item.description: Advice for aspiring speakers on sharing work publicly, submitting talks, and becoming more active in the security community.

item.title: Getting into Cyber
item.description: A practical conversation about how to get started in cybersecurity and build an early path into the field.
